title: Dominion Immersive Pack
description: A vanilla plus pack designed to be compatible with the rules & allowed mod's list of the Dominion Server.
body:
The official and only supported mod pack for the Dominion whitelisted survival server.

Our **"Immersive"** pack is designed to include mods which make your experience on Dominion truly unique. Included in addition to utility mods are mods which affect the audio and visuals of the world in a way that we believe adds to vanilla rather than taking away from the experience. 

Our **[Basics](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dominion-basics-pack)** pack includes only performance enhancing and the most common utility mods designed to improve your experience on our server. This is the ideal pack if you are on lower hardware or would like a base mod pack to build your own.
